feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Corporate Git Setup on SAP BTP versus connecting to Corporate Git directly from SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello,

We are planning to use Corporate Azure Repository for source code/version control management for the SAP Fiori developments done from SAP Business Application Studio. 

We are able to connect to Corporate Azure Repo from SAP Business Application studio using Git commands and push our changes to/from Repo.

We also found this document from SAP where it talks about setting up Cloud connector etc for Connecting to Corporate Git repository from SAP Business Application Studio.

Connecting to a Corporate Git Repository | SAP Help Portal

 

Question: Since we are able to connect to Corporate Git Repo without Cloud connector setup, may i know what is the use case where we need to use / follow the instruction for connecting to Corporate Git as mentioned in SAP Document above?

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Análise Combinatória de dados de bancos diferentes
entry.content:
Eu combinei dados de diferentes origens, um vindo do banco Hana e outro do banco Postgres. A visão do Postgres inclui os campos de código do cliente, nome do cliente, período e valor (que representa a análise do cliente), enquanto a do Hana traz o faturamento da empresa, fornecendo informações sobre as notas. Como se trata de notas, essa view retorna mais linhas do que a do Postgres. Ao combinar esses dados pelo código do cliente, os valores foram duplicados, mas não é claro algumas vezes. Uma abordagem que tentei foi adicionar uma coluna com o valor 1 para contar quantas vezes a mesma informação se repete e depois dividir os valores para obter os dados corretos. No entanto, mesmo ao considerar 1 essa coluna de contagem, ao finalizar a modelagem percebendo que ela contém outros valores além de 1, o que impede que o cálculo retorne os valores corretos. Alguém poderia me ajudar a solucionar esse problema?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Storage bin w36 / does not exist. (message no PK033)
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

first time i am creating kanban for semifinished in-house produced material. 
after creating production supply area through PK05. When i try to create control cycle through PK01 at that time i am facing above error (Storage bin w36 / does not exist). please help me to resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: How to manage maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In case I need to replace some of the parts before the planned maintenance call date

For example Plan 1 Year

Plan date : 1-JAN-2024

Complete date : 1-JAN-2024

Next Plan : 1-JAN-2025

Item 10 : Replace belt.
Item 20 : Replace bearing.
But Item 10 belt was damage on 1-MAR-2024 and I replaced the belt which meant it didn't go as planned. What do I need to do with my maintenance plan? In the event that I release a maintenance plan (as planned on 1-JAN-2025), if I release on 1-MAR-2024, that means that other plans It will not be processed. In this case, what should I do?

Regard

entry.title: Plant Tables for RERAPP transaction.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Kindly suggest the plant table names for RERAPP transaction.

 

Regards

Hari Prasath

entry.title: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

Can somebody please advise. I tried to book my SAP exam last night and I couldnt due to the system require me to link 2nd account to my Universal ID : message below

"Please note: to pass this exam and receive your certificate you need to have a SAP Universal ID setup with two linked email accounts! Please setup your SAP Universal ID and/or add your second email account now!
SAP Certified Associate - Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA
History"
I followed the link and added a new email, however, through it says the new email is linked, in the account it doesnt show so : it shows as not linked

I am absolutely stuck. Did somebody has similar issue and how can i resolve it?

 

Stella

entry.title: git command to connect to BTP Destination pointing to Git repo
entry.content:
Hello experts,

How do we specify the Git destination created on BTP to corporate git repo in Git command?

For instance Destination name is "gitrepo1" which points to corporate git account for example http://github.e/8042

when we use git clone <git repo>   -- how we need to specify the destination name here in this command

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Add date field in OPSN tcode for substitution
entry.content:
Hello, 

In OPSN T-Code, I have to add created date field in substitution rule. The condition I have to check is RA key have to fill when WBS element created before the constant date after the date it shouldn't. 

Prps-erdat< '17. 04.2012' but the condition is not working. 

Anyone can help me with this please

entry.title: ABAP Programming Error LIST_TOPOFPAGE_OVERFLOW
entry.content:
We are encountering a strange issue where executing MFN1 generates multiple ABAP DUMP errors. However, no data errors are found when querying using KOB1.
We have reviewed relevant SAP notes but have not found a solution. Please refer to the attached file for more details and help.

entry.title: Error while specifying intervals and posting rules in t code OAYR
entry.content:
Hi all , 

Iam getting an error message ac519 company code not defined while specifying intervals and posting rules 

Path : spro- img- fin acc- asset acco- integration with GL- post depreciation to GL- specify intervals and posting rules - execute  

I have checked Chart of depreciation is correctly assigned to company  code

Please any one help me out with this issue

entry.title: Gating Factor Date - View Gating Factors app SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to understand the meaning of the Gating Factor Date mentioned in the View Gating Factor App.

How is it calculated and what is the base date it is using? (Requested Date?)

SAP help does not provide an actual explanation or example of how it used.

Thanks.

Rgds

Harald

entry.title: Production order costs analysis before settlement
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a T-Code to get the costs analysis before settlement of a settled production order?

Regards

Tony

entry.title: How to post code in SAP Community >=2024
entry.content:
I'm posting a question with code, but the code looks ugly, no color and no monospaced font.

How to make it display pretty?

e.g. Want to download PDF from Spool using 'CONVERT_ABA... - SAP Community

entry.title: How to ask a question in SAP Community >= 2024
entry.content: I'm a little bit lost in the SAP Community, what is the right way to ask a question or find a solution to my question.

entry.title: "Mobile Services Cockpit - Trial" version warning "Missing Core Services"
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We would like to use "Mobile Services Cockpit - Trial" version before we plan for a BTP (Business Technology Paltform) purchase model from SAP.

In BTP cockpit, we've created a "instance" for service "Mobile Services". And after clicking the "instance", the web interface "Mobile Services - Trial" cockpit opened with warning "Your space is not correctly configured. The following problems were found: Missing Core Services". 

Any idea to fix the issue?

Additional information, you can find in the attached screenshot.

 

Thanks & best regards

Sreenu

entry.title: Manage Project Billing gives warning "One or several postings were excluded due to incomplete config
entry.content:
Application - Manage project billing.

issue-"to be billed" mount is wrong. automated Journal entry from service entry sheet GR, consisting of 1-hour amount instead of 8 hours.

entry.title: Download GL account master with data control information
entry.content:
How to Download GL accounts with supplementary Information. like data control etc.

Thank You

entry.title: How to set up workflow for QM notification in SAP
entry.content:
Hellow,

My customer wants to set up automatic workflow for QM notification tasks in SAP , he has 4 identified tasks and his request is that the first task will be launched by default when QM notification is generated and then the next task is generated after first task comletion  ...etc

A group of people has to be defined for each task 

He also wants that an SAP notification will be sent when tasks are generated 


Could you please help me with this setup?

 

Thank you 

best regards

entry.title: error during sap connection
entry.content:
I'm getting the error 'Failed to create COM object `SAPbobsCOM.Company': Class not registered' when trying to connect PHP with SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.190) FP 2202 (64-bit).

my php error line is"$mycomp = new COM("SAPbobsCOM.Company") or die("Cannot start SBO");"

entry.title: Using BAPI_BUPA_FS_BPADDITION_CHANGE to update table BP3100 is not working
entry.content:
In SAP Credit Management the additional information (table BP3100) on credit segment level of the business partner (FIORI App – Manage credit Accounts) can be used to assign information like collateral, credit insurance data and additional information (internal credit limits).

Since release S/4HANA OnPrem 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024) there is obviously a problem with the released function modules BAPI_BUPA_FS_BPADDITION_* (CHANGE, ADD, REMOVE) since database table BP3100 is not updated with the changes made. We already tried it through SAP Standard FIORI App F4596 and by using a test sequence in SE37 in combination with BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

Is there anyone who has experienced the same symptom in a S/4HANA OnPrem 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024) system?  

BTW: Changes made through transaction BP in dialogue mode are working fine and updates to table BP3100 will be applied without any problem.
